sentences.en: Why are some people right-handed and others left-handed?
sentences.zh: 为什么有些人惯用右手,有些人惯用左手?

grammar.note: 由 and 连接两个并列问句;后半句 others (are) left-handed 承前省略了 are。

sentences.en: This has never been a straightforward question to answer.
sentences.zh: 这从来都不是一个容易回答的问题。

grammar.note: has never been 现在完成时表持续状态;to answer 为不定式作后置定语修饰 question。

words.def: 简单明了的;直截了当的
